'''Nova Designs Incorporated''' was an arms manufacturer.<ref name="GG2-2" /> The company entered into a secret agreement with [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] in which they where supplied with [[spin-sealed]] [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna gas]] from [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="GG2">''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]''</ref>
